contract_summary: Put wrapper for struct afs_sysnames: decrements the usage refcount and, if it drops to zero, frees all dynamically allocated subsystem strings (except init and blank sysnames) and the struct itself. The caller must not use the sysnames pointer after calling this function, as the object may be freed. This function is the release side of the reference count lifecycle and should be called once per reference. It is NULL-safe (no-op if pointer is NULL).
